description_long: This is a single athletic sneaker featuring a combination of blue and yellow hues, with a suede-like texture on the toe, sides, and heel. The shoe displays three yellow stripes on each side, characteristic of Adidas branding, and a padded heel collar in a pale yellow shade. The laces are blue and follow a standard criss-cross pattern, while the tongue is light blue with a white patch at the top. The midsole is white and shows signs of wear, and the outsole is only partially visible. The overall condition suggests regular use, with visible scuffing and dirt, especially around the toe and heel.
description: A blue and yellow athletic sneaker with three side stripes, blue laces, and visible signs of wear. The shoe features a suede-like texture and a padded heel collar.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the padded yellow heel collar, Adidas logo on the heel tab, and visible wear on the back.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the three yellow stripes, blue suede upper, and the full length of the shoe.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the blue laces, light blue tongue, and scuffed toe area.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with three yellow stripes and visible wear on the midsole and upper.
attribute_logo: White Adidas trefoil logo on the heel tab
